tools.name: albums.checkUsersSavedAlbums
tools.description: Check if one or more albums is already saved in the current Spotify user's 'Your Music' library.

tools.name: albums.getAnAlbum
tools.description: Get Spotify catalog information for a single album.

tools.name: albums.getAnAlbumsTracks
tools.description:
Get Spotify catalog information about an album’s tracks.
Optional parameters can be used to limit the number of tracks returned.

tools.name: albums.getMultipleAlbums
tools.description: Get Spotify catalog information for multiple albums identified by their Spotify IDs.

tools.name: albums.getNewReleases
tools.description: Get a list of new album releases featured in Spotify (shown, for example, on a Spotify player’s “Browse” tab).

tools.name: albums.getUsersSavedAlbums
tools.description: Get a list of the albums saved in the current Spotify user's 'Your Music' library.

tools.name: albums.removeAlbumsUser
tools.description: Remove one or more albums from the current user's 'Your Music' library.

tools.name: albums.saveAlbumsUser
tools.description: Save one or more albums to the current user's 'Your Music' library.

tools.name: artists.getAnArtist
tools.description: Get Spotify catalog information for a single artist identified by their unique Spotify ID.

tools.name: artists.getAnArtistsAlbums
tools.description: Get Spotify catalog information about an artist's albums.

tools.name: artists.getAnArtistsRelatedArtists
tools.description: Get Spotify catalog information about artists similar to a given artist. Similarity is based on analysis of the Spotify community's [listening history](http://news.spotify.com/se/2010/02/03/related-artists/).

tools.name: artists.getAnArtistsTopTracks
tools.description: Get Spotify catalog information about an artist's top tracks by country.

tools.name: artists.getMultipleArtists
tools.description: Get Spotify catalog information for several artists based on their Spotify IDs.

tools.name: audiobooks.checkUsersSavedAudiobooks
tools.description: Check if one or more audiobooks are already saved in the current Spotify user's library.

tools.name: audiobooks.getAnAudiobook
tools.description:
Get Spotify catalog information for a single audiobook.
**Note: Audiobooks are only available for the US, UK, Ireland, New Zealand and Australia markets.**

tools.name: audiobooks.getAudiobookChapters
tools.description:
Get Spotify catalog information about an audiobook's chapters.
**Note: Audiobooks are only available for the US, UK, Ireland, New Zealand and Australia markets.**

tools.name: audiobooks.getMultipleAudiobooks
tools.description:
Get Spotify catalog information for several audiobooks identified by their Spotify IDs.
**Note: Audiobooks are only available for the US, UK, Ireland, New Zealand and Australia markets.**

tools.name: audiobooks.getUsersSavedAudiobooks
tools.description: Get a list of the audiobooks saved in the current Spotify user's 'Your Music' library.

tools.name: audiobooks.removeAudiobooksUser
tools.description: Remove one or more audiobooks from the Spotify user's library.

tools.name: audiobooks.saveAudiobooksUser
tools.description: Save one or more audiobooks to the current Spotify user's library.

tools.name: categories.getACategory
tools.description: Get a single category used to tag items in Spotify (on, for example, the Spotify player’s “Browse” tab).

tools.name: categories.getCategories
tools.description: Get a list of categories used to tag items in Spotify (on, for example, the Spotify player’s “Browse” tab).

tools.name: chapters.getAChapter
tools.description:
Get Spotify catalog information for a single chapter.
**Note: Chapters are only available for the US, UK, Ireland, New Zealand and Australia markets.**

tools.name: chapters.getSeveralChapters
tools.description:
Get Spotify catalog information for several chapters identified by their Spotify IDs.
**Note: Chapters are only available for the US, UK, Ireland, New Zealand and Australia markets.**

tools.name: episodes.checkUsersSavedEpisodes
tools.description: Check if one or more episodes is already saved in the current Spotify user's 'Your Episodes' library.

tools.name: episodes.getAnEpisode
tools.description:
Get Spotify catalog information for a single episode identified by its
unique Spotify ID.

tools.name: episodes.getMultipleEpisodes
tools.description: Get Spotify catalog information for several episodes based on their Spotify IDs.

tools.name: episodes.getUsersSavedEpisodes
tools.description: Get a list of the episodes saved in the current Spotify user's library.

tools.name: episodes.removeEpisodesUser
tools.description: Remove one or more episodes from the current user's library.

tools.name: episodes.saveEpisodesUser
tools.description: Save one or more episodes to the current user's library.

tools.name: genres.getRecommendationGenres
tools.description: Retrieve a list of available genres seed parameter values for [recommendations](/documentation/web-api/reference/#/operations/get-recommendations).

tools.name: markets.getAvailableMarkets
tools.description: Get the list of markets where Spotify is available.

tools.name: player.addToQueue
tools.description: Add an item to the end of the user's current playback queue.

tools.name: player.getAUsersAvailableDevices
tools.description: Get information about a user’s available devices.

tools.name: player.getInformationAboutTheUsersCurrentPlayback
tools.description: Get information about the user’s current playback state, including track or episode, progress, and active device.

tools.name: player.getQueue
tools.description: Get the list of objects that make up the user's queue.

tools.name: player.getRecentlyPlayed
tools.description:
Get tracks from the current user's recently played tracks.
_**Note**: Currently doesn't support podcast episodes._

tools.name: player.getTheUsersCurrentlyPlayingTrack
tools.description: Get the object currently being played on the user's Spotify account.

tools.name: player.pauseAUsersPlayback
tools.description: Pause playback on the user's account.

tools.name: player.seekToPositionInCurrentlyPlayingTrack
tools.description: Seeks to the given position in the user’s currently playing track.

tools.name: player.setRepeatModeOnUsersPlayback
tools.description:
Set the repeat mode for the user's playback. Options are repeat-track,
repeat-context, and off.

tools.name: player.setVolumeForUsersPlayback
tools.description: Set the volume for the user’s current playback device.

tools.name: player.skipUsersPlaybackToNextTrack
tools.description: Skips to next track in the user’s queue.

tools.name: player.skipUsersPlaybackToPreviousTrack
tools.description: Skips to previous track in the user’s queue.

tools.name: player.startAUsersPlayback
tools.description: Start a new context or resume current playback on the user's active device.

tools.name: player.toggleShuffleForUsersPlayback
tools.description: Toggle shuffle on or off for user’s playback.

tools.name: player.transferAUsersPlayback
tools.description: Transfer playback to a new device and determine if it should start playing.

tools.name: playlists.addTracksToPlaylist
tools.description: Add one or more items to a user's playlist.

tools.name: playlists.changePlaylistDetails
tools.description:
Change a playlist's name and public/private state. (The user must, of
course, own the playlist.)

tools.name: playlists.createPlaylist
tools.description:
Create a playlist for a Spotify user. (The playlist will be empty until
you [add tracks](/documentation/web-api/reference/#/operations/add-tracks-to-playlist).)

tools.name: playlists.getACategoriesPlaylists
tools.description: Get a list of Spotify playlists tagged with a particular category.

tools.name: playlists.getAListOfCurrentUsersPlaylists
tools.description:
Get a list of the playlists owned or followed by the current Spotify
user.

tools.name: playlists.getFeaturedPlaylists
tools.description: Get a list of Spotify featured playlists (shown, for example, on a Spotify player's 'Browse' tab).

tools.name: playlists.getListUsersPlaylists
tools.description: Get a list of the playlists owned or followed by a Spotify user.

tools.name: playlists.getPlaylist
tools.description: Get a playlist owned by a Spotify user.

tools.name: playlists.getPlaylistCover
tools.description: Get the current image associated with a specific playlist.

tools.name: playlists.getPlaylistsTracks
tools.description: Get full details of the items of a playlist owned by a Spotify user.

tools.name: playlists.removeTracksPlaylist
tools.description: Remove one or more items from a user's playlist.

tools.name: playlists.reorderOrReplacePlaylistsTracks
tools.description:
Either reorder or replace items in a playlist depending on the request's parameters. To reorder items, include `range_start`, `insert_before`, `range_length` and `snapshot_id` in the request's body. To replace items, include `uris` as either a query parameter or in the request's body. Replacing items in a playlist will overwrite its existing items. This operation can be used for replacing or clearing items in a playlist.
**Note**: Replace and reorder are mutually exclusive operations which share the same endpoint, but have different parameters. These operations can't be applied together in a single request.

tools.name: playlists.uploadCustomPlaylistCover
tools.description: Replace the image used to represent a specific playlist.

tools.name: search.getOperation
tools.description:
Get Spotify catalog information about albums, artists, playlists, tracks, shows, episodes or audiobooks that match a keyword string.
**Note: Audiobooks are only available for the US, UK, Ireland, New Zealand and Australia markets.**

tools.name: shows.checkUsersSavedShows
tools.description: Check if one or more shows is already saved in the current Spotify user's library.

tools.name: shows.getAShow
tools.description:
Get Spotify catalog information for a single show identified by its
unique Spotify ID.

tools.name: shows.getAShowsEpisodes
tools.description: Get Spotify catalog information about an show’s episodes. Optional parameters can be used to limit the number of episodes returned.

tools.name: shows.getMultipleShows
tools.description: Get Spotify catalog information for several shows based on their Spotify IDs.

tools.name: shows.getUsersSavedShows
tools.description: Get a list of shows saved in the current Spotify user's library. Optional parameters can be used to limit the number of shows returned.

tools.name: shows.removeShowsUser
tools.description: Delete one or more shows from current Spotify user's library.

tools.name: shows.saveShowsUser
tools.description: Save one or more shows to current Spotify user's library.

tools.name: tracks.checkUsersSavedTracks
tools.description: Check if one or more tracks is already saved in the current Spotify user's 'Your Music' library.

tools.name: tracks.getAudioAnalysis
tools.description: Get a low-level audio analysis for a track in the Spotify catalog. The audio analysis describes the track’s structure and musical content, including rhythm, pitch, and timbre.

tools.name: tracks.getAudioFeatures
tools.description:
Get audio feature information for a single track identified by its unique
Spotify ID.

tools.name: tracks.getRecommendations
tools.description:
Recommendations are generated based on the available information for a given seed entity and matched against similar artists and tracks. If there is sufficient information about the provided seeds, a list of tracks will be returned together with pool size details.

For artists and tracks that are very new or obscure there might not be enough data to generate a list of tracks.

tools.name: tracks.getSeveralAudioFeatures
tools.description: Get audio features for multiple tracks based on their Spotify IDs.

tools.name: tracks.getSeveralTracks
tools.description: Get Spotify catalog information for multiple tracks based on their Spotify IDs.

tools.name: tracks.getTrack
tools.description:
Get Spotify catalog information for a single track identified by its
unique Spotify ID.

tools.name: tracks.getUsersSavedTracks
tools.description: Get a list of the songs saved in the current Spotify user's 'Your Music' library.

tools.name: tracks.removeTracksUser
tools.description: Remove one or more tracks from the current user's 'Your Music' library.

tools.name: tracks.saveTracksUser
tools.description: Save one or more tracks to the current user's 'Your Music' library.

tools.name: users.checkCurrentUserFollows
tools.description: Check to see if the current user is following one or more artists or other Spotify users.

tools.name: users.checkIfUserFollowsPlaylist
tools.description: Check to see if one or more Spotify users are following a specified playlist.

tools.name: users.followArtistsUsers
tools.description: Add the current user as a follower of one or more artists or other Spotify users.

tools.name: users.followPlaylist
tools.description: Add the current user as a follower of a playlist.

tools.name: users.getCurrentUsersProfile
tools.description:
Get detailed profile information about the current user (including the
current user's username).

tools.name: users.getFollowed
tools.description: Get the current user's followed artists.

tools.name: users.getUsersProfile
tools.description: Get public profile information about a Spotify user.

tools.name: users.getUsersTopArtists
tools.description: Get the current user's top artists based on calculated affinity.

tools.name: users.getUsersTopTracks
tools.description: Get the current user's top tracks based on calculated affinity.

tools.name: users.unfollowArtistsUsers
tools.description: Remove the current user as a follower of one or more artists or other Spotify users.

tools.name: users.unfollowPlaylist
tools.description: Remove the current user as a follower of a playlist.

tools.name: openapi.previewSpec
tools.description: Preview an OpenAPI document before adding it as a source

tools.name: openapi.addSource
tools.description: Add an OpenAPI source and register its operations as tools
